tags.name: Google Drive
tags.description: Google Drive OAuth and resume copy endpoints

tags.name: Gamification
tags.description: Gamification profile, achievements and XP event endpoints

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile

put.description: Updates the currently authenticated user's profile data
Changes the currently authenticated user's password

400.description: Validation error or wrong current password

get.description: Returns a single job application owned by the authenticated user

put.description: Replaces all fields of an existing job application

get.summary: List all base resumes for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns lightweight metadata for all base resumes registered by the authenticated user. Use the returned UUID `id` field in subsequent API calls. Filenames and Google file IDs are NOT valid identifiers for resume operations.

post.summary: Register a Google Docs base resume
post.description: Registers a Google Docs document as a base resume for the authenticated user. Optionally set the language code and template flag for GPT/frontend discovery.

post.summary: Copy a base resume into an application folder
Generate an application resume by replacing template placeholders
post.description:
values is REQUIRED.
Keys must match the placeholders returned by the placeholder detection endpoint.
Use RESUMO instead of {{RESUMO}}.
Generate values for all detected placeholders before calling this endpoint.

404.description: Application or base resume not found

post.description: Registers a tracked client event and returns the updated XP snapshot
Resets the user password using a valid reset token
Creates a new user account and returns access and refresh tokens

400.description: Validation error or passwords do not match

post.description: Issues a new access token using the refresh token from HttpOnly cookie
Invalidates the refresh token from HttpOnly cookie
Authenticates a user and returns access token. Refresh token is sent via HttpOnly cookie.
Sends a password reset token to the provided email address

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of job applications for the authenticated user

parameters.name: recruiterDmReminderEnabled
parameters.description: Filter by recruiter DM reminder flag

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived flag (defaults to false)

post.description: Creates a new job application for the authenticated user
Sends a test email to the currently authenticated user's email address

patch.description: Partially updates only the status field of an application
Enables or disables the recruiter DM reminder for an application

patch.summary: Mark DM as sent to recruiter
patch.description: Marks that a DM was sent to the recruiter and hides from reminder panels

get.summary: Detect placeholders in a configured base resume
get.description: Analyzes the specified base resume for template placeholders and returns a list of detected placeholders. This endpoint is intended for AI/tool consumption to discover which placeholders are available for resume generation. The `baseResumeId` path parameter MUST be a UUID — filenames are NOT valid.

get.summary: Get plain text content of a base resume
get.description: Reads and returns the plain text content of the specified Google Docs base resume. Template placeholders such as {{SUMMARY}} and {{SKILLS}} are preserved as-is. The `resumeId` path parameter MUST be a UUID — filenames are NOT valid.

parameters.name: resumeId
parameters.description: UUID of the base resume. NOT the filename.

get.summary: Get plain text content of a generated resume
get.description: Returns plain text content extracted from the generated Google Docs resume. This endpoint is intended for AI/tool consumption instead of binary file download.

404.description: Application or generated resume not found

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current XP snapshot, level progress and rank title
Returns the authenticated user's achievement catalog and unlocked state
Returns aggregate statistics for the authenticated user's job applications
Returns applications with upcoming next-step dates
Returns applications whose next-step date has already passed
Extracts rich preview metadata (title, description, image, domain) from a URL

GoogleDriveRootFolderRequest.description: Request to configure the user's Google Drive root folder

folderIdOrUrl.description: Google Drive folder ID or URL

canUseGoogleIntegration.description: Whether the user can access Google integration features

organization.description: Organization or company that posted the vacancy

rhAcceptedConnection.description: Whether the recruiter accepted a LinkedIn connection

interviewScheduled.description: Whether an interview has been scheduled

previousStatus.description: Previous application status before Rejeitado or Ghosting

recruiterDmReminderEnabled.description: Whether a recruiter DM reminder is enabled

recruiterDmSentAt.description: Timestamp when DM was sent to the recruiter

driveVacancyFolderId.description: Google Drive vacancy folder ID associated with this application

driveResumeFileId.description: Last generated Google Docs resume file ID

driveResumeFileName.description: Last generated Google Docs resume file name

driveResumeDocumentUrl.description: URL for the last generated Google Docs resume

driveResumeGeneratedAt.description: Timestamp when the latest Google Docs resume was generated

ApplicationRequest.description: Request payload for creating or updating a job application

organization.description: Organization or company that posted the vacancy

vacancyLink.description: URL link to the vacancy posting

rhAcceptedConnection.description: Whether the recruiter accepted a LinkedIn connection

interviewScheduled.description: Whether an interview has been scheduled

enum: Fiz a Hiring Manager - Aguardando Atualização

recruiterDmReminderEnabled.description: Whether a DM reminder to the recruiter is enabled

GoogleDriveOAuthStartResponse.description: OAuth start response for Google Drive connection

state.description: Opaque state generated by the backend

scopes.description: OAuth scopes requested by the backend

GoogleDriveBaseResumeRequest.description: Request to register a Google Docs base resume

documentIdOrUrl.description: Google Docs document ID or URL

language.description: Language code of the resume (e.g. EN, PT)

template.description: Whether this resume is a template

GoogleDriveResumeCopyRequest.description: Request to copy a configured base resume into an application folder

GoogleDriveResumeCopyResponse.description: Result of copying a Google Docs resume into Drive

applicationId.description: ID of the application this resume is associated with

baseResumeId.description: ID of the base resume used as a template

copiedFileId.description: ID of the copied resume file in Google Drive

pdfFileId.description: ID of the generated PDF file in Google Drive

documentUrl.description: URL to view the generated resume document in Google Drive

pdfUrl.description: URL to download the generated resume PDF from Google Drive

values.description:
REQUIRED.

Map of placeholder values.

Keys must match the placeholder names returned by the placeholder detection endpoint.

Do NOT include curly braces.

placeholders.description: List of placeholders that were replaced in the generated resume

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resume was generated

ResumePlaceholderRequest.description: Request for resume placeholder detection or generation

values.description:
REQUIRED, placeholder values keyed by placeholder name without braces.

Map of placeholder values.

Keys must match the placeholder names returned by the placeholder detection endpoint.

Do NOT include curly braces.

GamificationEventResponse.description: Result of applying a gamification event

leveledUp.description: Whether the event caused a level up

GamificationProfileResponse.description: Gamification profile snapshot for the authenticated user

currentLevelXp.description: XP floor of the current level

nextLevelXp.description: XP required to reach the next level

GamificationEventRequest.description: Gamification event emitted by the client

applicationId.description: Application identifier related to the event

token.description: Password reset token received via email

AuthResponse.description: Authentication response containing access token and user info. Refresh token is sent via HttpOnly cookie.

RefreshResponse.description: Refreshed access token response. New refresh token is sent via HttpOnly cookie.

email.description: Email address associated with the account

UpdateStatusRequest.description: Request to update the status of a job application

enum: Fiz a Hiring Manager - Aguardando Atualização

UpdateReminderRequest.description: Request to toggle the recruiter DM reminder on an application

recruiterDmReminderEnabled.description: Whether the recruiter DM reminder should be enabled

MarkDmSentRequest.description: Request to mark that DM was sent to the recruiter

BaseResumeResponse.description: Lightweight metadata of a configured Google Docs base resume, optimised for GPT/frontend discovery

id.description: UUID of the base resume. Use this ID in API calls — filenames and Google file IDs are NOT valid here.

name.description: Display name of the resume document

language.description: Language code of the resume (e.g. EN, PT). Null when not configured.

template.description: Whether this resume is a reusable template

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this base resume was registered

BaseResumeContentResponse.description: Base resume metadata and plain text content extracted from Google Docs. Template placeholders such as {{SUMMARY}} and {{SKILLS}} are preserved as-is for AI analysis.

id.description: UUID of the base resume. Use this ID in API calls — filenames and Google file IDs are NOT valid here.

name.description: Display name of the resume document

language.description: Language code of the resume (e.g. EN, PT). Null when not configured.

template.description: Whether this resume is a reusable template

content.description: Plain text content extracted from the Google Docs document. Template placeholders such as {{SUMMARY}} and {{SKILLS}} are preserved.

AchievementResponse.description: Achievement status for the authenticated user

DashboardSummaryResponse.description: Aggregate dashboard statistics for the authenticated user

interviewCount.description: Cumulative count of interview status entries

dmRemindersEnabled.description: Applications with recruiter DM reminder enabled

toSendLater.description: Applications marked to send later (status is null)

averageDailyApplications.description: Average applications per day over the last 30 days

averageWeeklyApplications.description: Average applications per week over the last 12 weeks

averageMonthlyApplications.description: Average applications per month over the last 12 months

totalElements.description: Total number of applications matching the filter

LinkMetadataResponse.description: Rich link preview metadata extracted from a URL

description.example: Join our backend team and work on scalable microservices

scopes.write:applications: Create or update the authenticated user's applications
scopes.read:resume: Read resume content for the authenticated user
scopes.read:google-drive: Read Google Drive integration status for the authenticated user
scopes.read:metrics: Read dashboard metrics for the authenticated user
